author: Wayne F.
pros: The most powerful feature of this platform for us was the ability to integrate seamlessly into quite a number of upstream and downstream systems using a variety of integration methods (connected systems, pub/sub methods, web services of various types and shared data among others). With thousands of users working across complex, often long-running business processes, this was a key enabler.
cons: Recent releases have added capabilities only to the Appian Cloud based product, would like these also available to on-premise installations.

description: Over experience is good and easy, Appian tec team helped our team to build web services to get live data from Appian to our host system.
author: Kondaiah N.
pros: Easy for trucks route planning, modeling for retail whoole Route Planning, Modeling & Design sale Distribution , and easy to het real Time Data theough apis.
cons: Application is not having ability for cuatomers to Custumize dashboard reports available for tracking truck status.

description: Good workflow, Still to mature into a robust tool with better ui capabilities + performance monitoring and debugging capabilities
author: Parag S.
pros: Good workflow capabilities
cons: Very basic ui Immature deployment and monitoring capabilities

review_title: Best software ever to build and design business workflows
description: It releases new features and functionality in every quarter of the year to keep up with the cutting edge technology.
author: Varnika M.
pros: Low code platform so minimum coding is needed and turn around time to build and design workflows, user interfaces, reports, and dashboards is low.
cons: Appian is inefficient to handle enormous amount of data.

description: I was able to quickly standup useful business applications with Appian that has helped my department become more productive in day to day tasks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Appian's rapid application development capabilities allow you to quickly standup a production ready application with a user interface and business workflows.
cons: Some of the things involved in application development are not standards based. It feels like I have to learn a new programming language, although it is quite simple to learn.

review_title: Appiam alow code no code great tool
description: Excellent, but requires more tools to model data flows.
author: Sudharshan K.
pros: Excellent administration dashboards.user setup was very easy.
cons: Single instance setup is tpugh takes 40 minutes to update a patch in windows.

review_title: Best lowcode app development platform in the market!
description: Banking sector projects, healthcare projects
author: Khemraj S.
pros: It’s easy to setup integrations with 3rd party systems, prebuilt standard layouts and UI components & powerful process model capabilities are excellent.
cons: UI customisation should be improved, as we can use only standard components with standard functionality.

review_title: Hugely Effective BPM Tool with Ever-growing features!
description: I have been working as a developer on Appian for almost 2 years. This tools has been there in my organization for around 5 years now. We have replaced so many tools in BPM but this has always remained intact solely because of it's user-friendly approach, easy to learn and build and it's huge market dominance. I picked up the tool and got going with it in a week's time. It's so easy to learn it. Also, the kind of capabilities and features it provides and the overall UI has kept customer satisfaction levels in my organization at an all time high!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is the best BPM tool I have ever worked on. We are using it in our organization for 5+ years now. Features I like the most are : -Easy to learn and use. -Deployment suite is super nice and easy. -UI is very user-friendly and even a beginner will not have much difficulty in understanding and hovering around the tool a little bit. It's that easy! I was able to learn it in a week's time. -They are now also adding RPA features in the tool which makes us remain on the same tool skill set yet move around other BPM related industry capabilities like RPA and AI.
cons: It might be a little costly for small and medium enterprises. I can't think of anything else.

description: Appian is used for approval of various users and services and has a set up where role based/level based approvals are handled.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Appian has functionality for users, where various functions can be created as per the process.
cons: Appian sometimes is slow because of large user base and data activity.

description: BPM tool is nice to use , RPA and other features are available in the tool and i have not used it yet.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Installation and configuration is easy. Maintenance is easy and upgrades are easy. Platform contains latest technologies.
cons: Expression builder is a tough debugging ask. Design considerations are to run deep. Database design considerations are also to run deep to maintain developers ease to debug and update.

description: Very process driven, quick app option for pic and then to the full development cycle is very helpful.
author: Sunil K.
pros: Easy to develop a quick app. Well documented
cons: Expensive, Report need more options

description: Great, product has been easy to implement. Several applications deployed on the same platform make maintenance easy
author: Sachin P.
pros: Easy to learn
cons: Parallel development can be challenging

description: Design and implement bpms applications are getting way easier if I use Appian product. And the UI design using sail form is the best.
author: Henry D.
pros: UI design
cons: Integration

author: Prabhdeep S.
pros: It is quick to learn as compared to other BPM products. Deployments are quick and easy. UI is clean and responsiveness is built in.
cons: Appian needs to reduce its license cost. Some of the components needs to be improved in performance wise.

review_title: Hard start-up but fast delivery apps
description: On-premise solutions hard to maintain for not specialized it dept. Fantastic delivery experience on apps design and meet user requirements on time. Cloud the best choise
author: Bruno C.
pros: Flexibility
cons: You can do everything

review_title: A Flexible and Friendly BPM Tool
author: Joe H.
pros: We have found Appian to be very flexible and well suited to whatever requirement we have thrown at it.
cons: Appian training is quite basic and linear. On premise support could be better. So many product releases in a year can also make it difficult to stay on the latest version

description: More then 1 year experience with Appian in Europe. With an insurance company in the Netherlands. Project exists of 2 different applications and multiple integrations.
author: David G.
pros: Low code
cons: UI possibilities

author: Laura V.
pros: Easy to use and customize with personalizations and to use
cons: Only a tool for WF not for more complex applications

description: The product UI required a overhaul for a long time. The product is still perceived as difficult to use compared to Pega or IBM BPM even though it is not the case.
author: Suren R.
pros: Price and applicability as a light weight BPM software
cons: Rigid UI and cannot customize easily

description: Great features and functional UI. All processes are tracked. Only complaint is need to learn Appian expression language to make advanced functionality. Once learned, can really develop relatively quick. Love RAD.
author: John G.
pros: Rapid development cycles.
cons: The expression language is unique and needs to be learned to perform advanced features. Would rather use JavaScript or groovy natively.

description: Great product. Quick development. Proper low code platform. Our implementation for Aegon is a great success. Now they discovered the product options, plenty of new projects will be using Appian.
author: Patrick V.
pros: Quick development time. Good ootb features
cons: UI features could be improved to compete with modern standards like Angualr

description: There is no better nor cost efficient way to start your digital transformation than with Appian. With a complete development platform you will be deploying processes in a rid fashion.
author: Bret B.
pros: Complete feature set
cons: Can be a bit inflexible when it comes to UI design.

description: 360 degree is most unique pitch around the Appian Platform. We hope to build many attractive propositions for our Life Sciences customers using this platform. Awaiting more flexible options in future releases as this platform grows from strength to strength
author: Neeraj K.
pros: Visualization
cons: Some of the screens don't have flexibility around the UI, but am hearing that it's coming in the next 2 releases
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great one point stop for solution, whether it's transforming your IT or bringing in digital or process transformation. Know about all the latest trends in IT space.
author: Amresh S.

description: Appian UI is great. Like it's out of Box features . Ian surprised and thrilled the way it is getting used in healt care industry . We all know what great it can do in financial segment. Great product. The plug -in are easy to configure as well.
author: Sabyasachi D.
pros: Fantastic UI , out of Box features
cons: Costly
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
